evals.prompt: Given 10 Zotero items on boryl radicals with mixed metadata quality, classify them using the default schema and produce concise manuscript-ready notes.
evals.expected_output: Per-item tags, confidence, where-to-cite guidance, and short notes with limitations.

evals.prompt: I pasted an introduction paragraph. Find supporting references from my Zotero library only and propose citations for intro paragraph 3-4.
evals.expected_output: Ranked citation candidates with rationale and no fabricated references.

evals.prompt: For items already tagged methodology and mechanism, reorganize into Background reviews vs Mechanistic precedents and add a 3-line note each.
evals.expected_output: Collection decisions plus concise notes reflecting evidence from abstract/full text.

evals.prompt: Use my custom workflow profile from user-workflow.yaml: tags [review, benchmark, to-cite], section labels [intro, method, results], and note fields [TL;DR, Evidence quality, Citation sentence]. Classify 8 imported items and produce notes using only that profile.
evals.expected_output: Per-item tags, confidence, where-to-cite labels, and notes that follow the custom profile instead of skill defaults.
